Theme.Name: Theme Settings
Theme.Label: Configure Theme
Theme.Hint: Customize colors, sizes, and appearance of the BG3 HUD
Theme.Title: Theme Settings
Theme.GeneralHint: Parameters applied to all components below if not specified.
Theme.UseGeneralEverywhereHint: When enabled, only the General section is used. Disable to customize each section.
Theme.SmallContainersHint: Shared styling for control, views, filters, passives, and active effects containers.

NormalOpacity.Name: Normal Opacity
NormalOpacity.Hint: The opacity of the HUD when visible (0.1 to 1.0)

FadedOpacity.Name: Faded Opacity
FadedOpacity.Hint: The opacity when the HUD fades out after inactivity (set to 1.0 to disable fading)

FadeOutDelay.Name: Fade Out Delay (seconds)
FadeOutDelay.Hint: How long to wait before fading out the HUD (1 to 30 seconds)

AutoScale.Name: Auto Scale
AutoScale.Hint: Automatically scale the UI based on screen height

UIScale.Name: UI Scale
UIScale.Hint: Manual UI scale percentage (50% to 300%). Only used when Auto Scale is disabled.

UIPosition.Name: UI Position
UIPosition.Hint: Where to position the HUD on the screen

PosPaddingBottom.Name: Bottom Padding
PosPaddingBottom.Hint: Padding from the bottom of the screen (pixels)

PassivesContainerIconsPerRow.Name: Passive Feature Icons Per Row
PassivesContainerIconsPerRow.Hint: Number of Passive Feature icons displayed per row before wrapping

ActiveEffectsContainerIconsPerRow.Name: Active Effect Icons Per Row
ActiveEffectsContainerIconsPerRow.Hint: Number of Active Effect icons displayed per row before wrapping

ShowPassiveActiveEffects.Name: Show Passive Active Effects
ShowPassiveActiveEffects.Hint: When enabled, displays permanent/passive active effects (no duration) in addition to temporary effects

ShowFilters.Name: Show Filter Icons
ShowFilters.Hint: Display the spell slot and action type filter icons above the hotbar

ShowPortraitHPControls.Name: Show Portrait HP Controls
ShowPortraitHPControls.Hint: Display the buttons to set HP to minimum (skull), maximum (heart), and the HP input field in the portrait UI

LayoutAppearance.MenuHint: Adjust opacity, scaling, positioning, and container density

Appearance.MenuHint: Adjust opacity and fade timing for the HUD

Layout.MenuHint: Adjust scaling and positioning of the HUD

FoundryUI.MenuHint: Control macro bar visibility and tooltip timing

TargetSelector.MenuHint: Configure BG3-style target selection for spells and abilities
TargetSelector.EnableHint: When enabled, clicking spells/abilities that need targets will prompt for target selection
TargetSelector.SkipHint: Skip the target selector if you already have a valid target selected
TargetSelector.RangeHint: Prevent targeting tokens that are out of range
TargetSelector.AutoSelfHint: Automatically target yourself for self-targeting abilities
TargetSelector.ShowRangeIndicatorsHint: Display a visual indicator showing the range of the ability on the canvas
TargetSelector.RangeShapeHint: Shape of the range indicator (circle or square)
TargetSelector.RangeAnimationHint: Animation style for the range indicator
TargetSelector.RangeLineWidthHint: Thickness of the range indicator line
TargetSelector.RangeColorHint: Color of the range indicator (hex format)

PortraitData.Title: Portrait Data Configuration
PortraitData.MenuHint: Display data badges around the portrait (AC, Speed, Hero Points, etc.)
PortraitData.ShowHint: Display data badges around the character portrait
PortraitData.SyncedToWorld: Portrait data synced to world - all players will now use this configuration
PortraitData.WorldConfigActive: Your GM has set a world config

Lock.NoSettingsWarning: Please right-click the lock button to select which settings to lock.

GMToggle.Tooltip: Toggle between GM Hotbar and Token Hotbar

ContextMenu.AutoPopulateHint: Manually populate this container with items from the actor. Note: NPCs auto-populate on token creation, but player characters should use this option.

Views.CustomIconLabel: Or enter custom Font Awesome class:

TargetSelector.Instructions: Select {min}-{max} targets. Press {confirm} to confirm, {cancel} to cancel.
TargetSelector.Activated: Target selection active. Press {confirm} to confirm, {cancel} to cancel.
